creator: bsdpr@phoe.frmug.org
text:
On a 12.3-STABLE host (rev d891ee6ac7e6af693959c6d11c5af7c440919ea9),
ipfw(8) rejects addition of rules comprising symbolic ports containing a dash. Non dashed port names are accepted. The parser is in error as all the names listed in /etc/services should be acceptable.

Examples:

# ipfw add 10000 deny udp from 10/8 to me dhcp-failover
ipfw: unrecognised option [-1] dhcp-failover

# ipfw add 10000 deny tcp from 10/8 to me ftp-data
ipfw: unrecognised option [-1] ftp-data
